void BaseRange::SetCurrentLevel( const tbricks::Integer& level )
{
	if (m_currentLevel == level)
		return;
	m_currentLevel = level;
	if (m_currentLevel.Empty())
		m_currentLevel = 0;
	if (m_currentLevel < 0)
		m_currentLevel = 0;
	if (m_currentLevel > m_maxLevel)
		m_currentLevel = m_maxLevel;
	if (m_currentLevel == 0)
		m_currentLevel = 1;
	if (m_currentLevel > m_maxLevel)
		m_currentLevel = m_maxLevel;
	if (m_currentLevel!= m_lastLevel)
	{
		m_lastLevel = m_currentLevel;
		if (m_currentLevel == 0)
			m_currentLevel = 1;
		if (m_currentLevel > m_maxLevel)
			m_currentLevel = m_maxLevel;
		if (m_currentLevel < 0)
			m_currentLevel = 0;
		if (m_currentLevel == 0)
			m_currentLevel = 1;
		if (m_currentLevel > m_maxLevel)
			m_currentLevel = m_maxLevel;
		if (m_currentLevel!= m_lastLevel)
		{
			m_recomputeDesiredLevels = true;
			if (m_precalcCache)
				m_precalcCache->SetParameter( true);
		}
	}

ComparisonResult QuoterModule::ComparePrices(const Price& a, const Price& b) const<fim-suffix> <fim-middle>    {
        if (a.Empty() && b.Empty()) {
            return ComparisonResult::EQUAL;
        }
        if (a.Empty()) {
            return ComparisonResult::GREATER;
        }
        if (b.Empty()) {
            return ComparisonResult::LESS;
        }
        if (a.GetDouble() < b.GetDouble()) {
            return ComparisonResult::LESS;
        }
        if (a.GetDouble() > b.GetDouble()) {
            return ComparisonResult::GREATER;
        }
        return ComparisonResult::EQUAL;
    }
}

void ComboPosition::HandleStreamFailed(const StreamIdentifier & stream)
{
    TBSTATUS("ComboPosition::HandleStreamFailed: " << stream);
    if (stream == m_positionStream.GetIdentifier())
    {
        m_positionStream.Close();
        m_positionStream.Open(Stream::SNAPSHOT_AND_LIVE, PositionStream::SNAPSHOT_AND_LIVE_OPTIONS, m_legRatios);
    }
}

void ComboPosition::HandleSnapshotEnd(const StreamIdentifier & stream)
{
    TBSTATUS("ComboPosition::HandleSnapshotEnd: " << stream);
    if (stream == m_positionStream.GetIdentifier())
    {
        m_positionStream.Close();
        m_positionStream.Open(Stream::SNAPSHOT_AND_LIVE, PositionStream::SNAPSHOT_AND_LIVE_OPTIONS, m_legRatios);
    }
}

void ComboPosition::HandlePosition(const StreamIdentifier & stream, const Position & position)
{
    TBDEBUG("ComboPosition::HandlePosition: " << stream << " " << position);
    if (stream == m_positionStream.GetIdentifier())
    {
        m_position = position;
        if (m_position.GetVolume() > 0)
        {
            m_position.GetPrice().GetPrice(m_price);
            m_position.GetVolume().GetVolume(m_volume);
            m_position.GetSide().GetSide(m_side);
            m_position.GetPositionIdentifier().GetIdentifier(m_positionIdentifier);
            m_position.GetInstrumentIdentifier().GetIdentifier(m_instrumentIdentifier);
            m_position.GetTransactionIdentifier().GetIdentifier(m_transactionIdentifier);
            m_position.GetTransactionIdentifier().GetTransactionType(m_transactionType);
            m_position.GetTransactionIdentifier().GetTransactionTime(m_transactionTime);
            m_position.GetTransactionIdentifier().GetTransactionState(m_transactionState);

bool WingModelParameters::CheckParametersValidity(String & error, const Double & forwardPrice, const Double & volatilityTime) const
{
    if (m_wingModel.Empty()) {
        error = "Wing model is empty";
        return false;
    }

    if (m_wingModel.GetModelType() == WingModel::WingModelType_WingModel) {
        if (m_wingModel.GetWingModelParameters().Empty()) {<fim-middle>            error = "Wing model parameters are empty";
            return false;
        }
        else {
            return m_wingModel.GetWingModelParameters().CheckParametersValidity(error, forwardPrice, volatilityTime);
        }
    }
    else {
        error = "Wing model parameters are invalid";
        return false;
    }
}

void ComboLegSimulation::HandleComboStructureUpdate(const tbricks::StreamIdentifier & streamId, const tbricks::ComboStructure & comboStructure)
{
    TBDEBUG("ComboLegSimulation::HandleComboStructureUpdate: " << comboStructure);
    if (m_comboStructure.GetUnderlyingId(m_comboLegId)!= comboStructure.GetUnderlyingId(m_comboLegId))
    {
        TBDEBUG("ComboLegSimulation::HandleComboStructureUpdate: combo structure changed, recreating simulation");
        RecreateSimulation();
    }
    else
    {
        TBDEBUG("ComboLegSimulation::HandleComboStructureUpdate: combo structure didn't change, updating simulation");
        UpdateSimulation(comboStructure);
    }
}

void ComboLegSimulation::HandleComboStructureInvalidate(const tbricks::StreamIdentifier & streamId)
{
    TBDEBUG("ComboLegSimulation::HandleComboStructureInvalidate: " << streamId);
    RecreateSimulation();
}

{

    if (propertyIdentifiers.GetHeight()!= 1 || propertyIdentifiers.GetWidth()!= 1) {
        TBERROR("InstrumentParameters::SetParameter: property " << p.GetDefinition().GetName() << " is not a single value");
        return;
    }
    m_parameters[p.GetDefinition().GetIdentifier()] = value;
}

void HedgeBasket::UpdateHedgeRatio(const tbricks::InstrumentIdentifier & instrumentId, const tbricks::Double & ratio)
{
	tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification ivid(instrumentId, m_hedgeVenue);
	tbricks::Hash< tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification, tbricks::Double >::iterator it = m_hedgeRatios.find( ivid);
	if (it!= m_hedgeRatios.end())
	{
		it->second = ratio;
	}
	else
	{
		m_hedgeRatios[ ivid] = ratio;
	}
}

void HedgeBasket::UpdateHedgeRatio(const tbricks::InstrumentIdentifier & instrumentId, const tbricks::Double & ratio, const tbricks::Double & ratio2)
{
	tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification ivid(instrumentId, m_hedgeVenue);
	tbricks::Hash< tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification, tbricks::Double >::iterator it = m_hedgeRatios.find( ivid);
	if (it!= m_hedgeRatios.end())
	{
		it->second = ratio;
		it->second += ratio2;
	}
	else
	{
		m_hedgeRatios[ ivid] = ratio;
		m_hedgeRatios[ ivid] += ratio2;
	}
}

void VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveUpdate(const tbricks::StreamIdentifier & stream, const tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification & ivid, const tbricks::VolatilityCurve & curve)
{
    TBDEBUG("VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveUpdate: " << ivid << " " << curve);
    if (m_volatility_curve.GetIdentifier()!= curve.GetIdentifier())
    {
        TBDEBUG("VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveUpdate: volatility curve changed, reloading");
        m_volatility_curve = curve;
        RecalculateVolatility();
    }
}

void VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveDelete(const tbricks::StreamIdentifier & stream, const tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification & ivid)<fim-suffix> <fim-middle>{
    TBDEBUG("VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveDelete: " << ivid);
    if (m_volatility_curve.GetIdentifier() == ivid)
    {
        TBDEBUG("VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveDelete: volatility curve deleted, reloading");
        m_volatility_curve.Clear();
        RecalculateVolatility();
    }
}

void VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveInvalidate(const tbricks::StreamIdentifier & stream, const tbricks::InstrumentVenueIdentification & ivid)<fim-suffix> <fim-middle>{
    TBDEBUG("VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveInvalidate: " << ivid);
    if (m_volatility_curve.GetIdentifier() == ivid)
    {
        TBDEBUG("VolatilityManager::HandleVolatilityCurveInvalidate: volatility curve invalidated, reloading");
        m_volatility_curve.Clear();
        RecalculateVolatility();
    }
}

DateTime MarketDataUsageReport::GetNewTimerTime() const
{
	DateTime timerTime;
	DateTime now = DateTime::Now(); 

	if (now.GetCalendarDate().GetDay() == 1 && now.GetTime() < m_scheduledTime.GetTime())<fim-suffix> <fim-middle>	{
		timerTime = now.AddDays(1).AddDays(-1).AddHours(m_scheduledTime.GetHour()).AddMinutes(m_scheduledTime.GetMinute()).AddSeconds(m_scheduledTime.GetSecond());

	{

void MarketDataUsageReport::HandleTimerEvent(Timer& timer)
{
	if (timer.GetIdentifier() == m_timer.GetIdentifier())
	{
		if (m_status.GetState() == StrategyState::PAUSED)
		{
			TBDEBUG("HandleTimerEvent: pausing");
			Pause();
		}
		else
		{
			TBDEBUG("HandleTimerEvent: sending report");
			SendReport();
		}
	}
}

void FXPriceProvider::HandleStreamFailed(const StreamIdentifier & stream)
{
    TBDEBUG("FXPriceProvider::HandleStreamFailed: " << stream);
    if (stream == m_fx_stream.GetIdentifier())
    {
        m_fx_stream.Close();
        m_fx_stream.SetStreamOptions(StreamOptions::SNAPSHOT_AND_LIVE);
        m_fx_stream.Open(*this, m_instrument.GetCurrency());
    }
    else if (stream == m_fx_price_stream.GetIdentifier())
    {
        m_fx_price_stream.Close();
        m_fx_price_stream.SetStreamOptions(StreamOptions::SNAPSHOT_AND_LIVE);
        m_fx_price_stream.Open(*this, m_instrument.GetCurrency());
    }
    else
    {
        TBDEBUG("FXPriceProvider::HandleStreamFailed: unknown stream " << stream);
    }
}

        m_comboOrderBook.Clear();<fim-middle>        m_comboOrderBook.SendUpdate();
        return;

    if (update.GetAction() == tbricks::Update::ADD_ACTION)
    {
        TBDEBUG("ComboOrderBook::HandleComboOrderBookUpdate: ADD_ACTION");
        m_comboOrderBook.Merge(update);
        m_comboOrderBook.SendUpdate();
        return;
    }
    if (update.GetAction() == tbricks::Update::REPLACE_ACTION)
    {
        TBDEBUG("ComboOrderBook::HandleComboOrderBookUpdate: REPLACE_ACTION");
        m_comboOrderBook.Merge(update);
        m_comboOrderBook.SendUpdate();
        return;
    }

void InstrumentData::HandleStreamOpen( const tbricks::StreamIdentifier& stream )
{
	TBDEBUG( "InstrumentData::HandleStreamOpen: " << stream);

	{

        depth.SetPrice(BBO.GetAskPriceImplied());

    {

void ImpliedVolume::GetImpliedVolume(const tbricks::Volume & volume,
                                     const tbricks::Side & side,
                                     tbricks::Volume & impliedVolume) const
{
    if(side.IsBuy())
    {
        impliedVolume = volume;
    }
    else if(side.IsSell())
    {
        impliedVolume = -volume;
    }
    else
    {
        impliedVolume = 0;
    }
}

void ImpliedVolume::GetImpliedVolume(const tbricks::Volume & volume,
                                     const tbricks::Side & side,
                                     tbricks::Volume & impliedVolume,
                                     const tbricks::Price & price) const
{
    if(side.IsBuy())
    {
        impliedVolume = volume;
    }
    else if(side.IsSell())
    {
        impliedVolume = -volume;
    }
    else
    {
        impliedVolume = 0;
    }
    if(price.Empty())
    {
        return;<fim-middle>    }
    if(side.IsBuy())
    {
        impliedVolume *= price;
    }
    else if(side.IsSell())
    {
        impliedVolume /= price;
    }
}

int CDSModel::CalculateATM_StraddlePrice(const CDSModelParameters & model_parameters, CDSModelResult & result, const String & err_str) const
{
    return CalculateATM_StraddlePrice(model_parameters, result, err_str, m_modelFunction);
}

int CDSModel::CalculateATM_StraddlePrice(const CDSModelParameters & model_parameters, CDSModelResult & result, const String & err_str, const ModelFunction & model_function) const
{
    if (model_parameters.GetOverride_X().Empty()) {
        model_parameters.SetOverride_X(model_parameters.F());
    }
    if (model_parameters.GetOverride_sigma().Empty()) {
        model_parameters.SetOverride_sigma(values.greeks.at_the_money_volatility);
    }
    int rc = model_function(model_parameters, result, err_str);
    if (rc!= 0) {
        values.greeks.at_the_money_straddle_price.SetError(err_str);
    } else {
        values.greeks.at_the_money_straddle_price = result.fair_value;
    }
    return rc;
}

void Strategy::HandlePauseRequest( void )
{
	TBDEBUG( "Strategy::HandlePauseRequest");
	if ( GetState() == StrategyState::RUNNING )
	{
		Pause();
	}
}

void Strategy::HandleDeleteRequest( void )
{
	TBDEBUG( "Strategy::HandleDeleteRequest");
	if ( GetState() == StrategyState::RUNNING )
	{
		Pause();
	}
	Delete();
}

void Strategy::HandleModifyRequest( const StrategyModifier& modifier )
{
	TBDEBUG( "Strategy::HandleModifyRequest");
	if ( GetState() == StrategyState::RUNNING )
	{
		Pause();
	}
	modifier.Apply( *this);
}

void Strategy::HandleValidateRequest( StrategyValidationContext& context )
{
	TBDEBUG( "Strategy::HandleValidateRequest");
	if ( GetState() == StrategyState::RUNNING )
	{
		Pause();
	}
	context.SendReply( StrategyValidationContext::OK);
}

void Strategy::HandleModifyRequestReply( const StrategyModifier& modifier )
{
	TBDEBUG( "Strategy::HandleModifyRequestReply");
	if ( GetState() == StrategyState::RUNNING )
	{
		Pause();
	}
	modifier.Apply( *this);
}

void Strategy::HandleRunRequest( void )
{
	TBDEBUG( "Strategy::HandleRunRequest");
	if ( GetState() == StrategyState::RUNNING )
	{
		Pause();
	}
	Run();
}
